response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive experience in software development, particularly in web, mobile, and embedded systems, but his background does not align closely with the Principal Performance Architect role. His expertise is in general software engineering, cloud infrastructure, and AI-agent tooling rather than SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware optimization, or deep-learning workload analysis. His education and work history lack the specialized hardware/performance focus required for this role.
strengths: Strong software engineering background with experience in performance-critical systems (e.g., low-latency apps, real-time metadata handling)
Proven ability to optimize and scale systems (e.g., pricing strategies, direct mail automation, GIS platform)
Experience with diverse languages and tools (e.g., C/C++, DLang, Java), demonstrating adaptability
concerns: Lacks explicit experience with SoC/IP modeling or hardware-software co-design, which are core to the role
No demonstrated background in AI accelerator architecture, GPU optimization, or deep-learning workload analysis
Education and work history do not meet the specialized technical requirements (e.g., PhD/Master's in relevant field or equivalent hardware-focused experience)
